svg.text: Click any topic to learn more

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Teach me CSS fundamentals: what is CSS, how does it connect to HTML, and how do selectors and the cascade work?')
g.text: What CSS is, linking to HTML, cascade

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain CSS selectors in depth: element, class, ID, attribute, pseudo-class, pseudo-element, and combinators.')
sendPrompt('Teach me the CSS box model: content, padding, border, margin, and how box-sizing works.')
sendPrompt('Explain CSS typography and color: font-family, font-size, font-weight, line-height, color, and background-color with examples.')
sendPrompt('Teach me CSS display and positioning: block vs inline vs inline-block, position static/relative/absolute/fixed/sticky, and z-index.')
sendPrompt('Teach me CSS Flexbox from scratch: the flex container, flex direction, justify-content, align-items, flex-wrap, and flex-grow.')
sendPrompt('Teach me CSS Grid layout: defining rows and columns, grid-template, gap, placing items with grid-column and grid-row, and auto-placement.')
sendPrompt('Teach me responsive design in CSS: media queries, breakpoints, mobile-first approach, relative units like rem, em, vw, and vh.')
sendPrompt('Teach me CSS transitions and animations: the transition property, keyframes with @keyframes, animation-duration, animation-timing-function, and transform.')
sendPrompt('Teach me CSS custom properties (variables) and how to organise CSS: naming conventions, custom properties with var(), and introduction to BEM methodology.')
sendPrompt('Give me a CSS basics mini project to practice everything: a responsive card component with typography, flexbox, hover animations, and CSS variables.')
